title: forms — data retention windows
description: Form schemas retained indefinitely (immutable audit trail). Submissions inherit the sensitivity of their most-sensitive answer field — medical / safeguarding submissions retained 7yr; standard submissions 2yr; abandoned sessions swept quickly.

policies.description: Form definitions retained indefinitely. Audit + rollback lineage needs full history.
Version snapshots retained indefinitely — every submission points to the version it was submitted against; deleting a version orphans submissions.

conditions: status IN ('abandoned', 'failed_validation') AND handoff_status IS NULL
policies.description: Abandoned + never-completed submissions: 90d hot, 2yr warm, purge.

conditions: status = 'completed' AND (sensitivity IS NULL OR sensitivity = 'public')
policies.description: Completed standard submissions: 2yr full retention. Handoff target references remain.
Medical + safeguarding submissions: 7yr min under compliance horizon. Legal-hold exception may extend indefinitely.
PurgeAbandonedSessionsJob sweeps expired in-progress sessions. Transitions to `abandoned` (which then follows abandoned retention above).

gdpr_deletion: On user account deletion, form submissions where the submitter matches the deleted user have `answers` replaced with '[REDACTED]' tombstone. The submission shell (form_id, form_version_id, timestamps, handoff pointers) remains for downstream FK integrity.
